nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
A young woman sitting comfortably while playing an acoustic guitar, performing a simple, cheerful song. She is relaxed and expressive, gently swaying with the rhythm. Her fingers move naturally on the guitar strings and fretboard with realistic strumming and chord transitions.

She sings directly to the camera with a warm, soft voice, her lips perfectly synced to the lyrics. Subtle facial expressions, smiling eyes, and emotional connection to the music. Natural breathing, blinking, and micro-expressions.

The setting is cozy and aesthetic — either a softly lit room with warm ambient lighting (fairy lights, sunset through a window) or an outdoor golden-hour scene. Cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high detail, realistic skin tones, and natural motion.

Camera: slow, gentle push-in or slight handheld movement for intimacy. Audio-driven performance feel, smooth animation, no distortion, consistent character identity. 4K quality.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
A cinematic scene of a 5-year-old child standing outdoors next to a playful dog, both completely covered in wet mud after playing. The environment looks like a backyard or park after rain, with puddles, soft natural daylight, and subtle reflections in the water. The child is smiling, slightly breathing from excitement, with messy hair and muddy clothes. The dog is happy, wagging its tail, also covered in mud.

The child looks at the camera and speaks naturally with expressive facial movement, accurate lip-sync, and a joyful tone. Subtle body movement, blinking, and realistic micro-expressions. The dog occasionally moves slightly (tail wag, small head movement).

Highly realistic style, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, detailed mud texture on skin and fur, 4K quality. Gentle handheld camera feel or slow push-in for immersion. Natural physics, no distortion, consistent character identity.

kid saying: "hey mom, it was not me, it was the dog, i swear"
